postDownloadModal.empathyText: If you only needed this document for now, feel free to close this window and continue with your work. Best of luck!

homePage.pageTitle: Belge Hızlı — Smart Form & Contract Builder
homePage.metaDescription: A clean document workspace with smart form infrastructure where you can easily prepare contracts, petitions or official correspondence.
homePage.heroSub: A recurring contract, a formal notice, or a technical document — whatever you're writing, turn your text into a fillable smart form in seconds.

homePage.magicDescription: Already have a draft? Paste or drag your text into the workspace. With the "Detect All" button, the system automatically finds all variables in your text and builds the form for you.
homePage.bubbleTitle: Select text, turn it into a question
homePage.bubbleDescription: Select the words that will change in each document and convert them into a dynamic form question with a single click.
homePage.logicDescription: No need to prepare separate contract drafts for each client or situation. With "Conditional Blocks", specific sections of your document are automatically shown or hidden based on a form answer.
homePage.useCasesDescription: Reduce your operational workload in any field, thanks to variables and smart forms.

useCases.hrDesc: Instantly customize employment contracts, reference letters, job offers and benefits notifications.
useCases.legalDesc: Dynamically generate notices, lease agreements, powers of attorney and real estate purchase commitments.
useCases.freelancerDesc: Personalize project proposals, NDAs and service agreements in seconds.
useCases.educationDesc: Automate student acceptance letters, internship contracts and thesis advisory forms.
useCases.healthDesc: Quickly personalize patient information forms, consent documents and examination reports.
useCases.ecommerceDesc: Dynamically generate supplier contracts, return policies and dealer agreements.

homePage.searchDescription: If you don't want to start from scratch, browse our pre-built general-purpose templates and get instant PDF output.
homePage.searchPlaceholder: E.g.: Lease agreement, resignation letter, notice...
homePage.ctaDescription: Sign up to create and save your own templates.

aboutUs.metaDescription: Learn about the mission of Belge Hızlı and how we simplify the online document creation process.
aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.paragraph1: our goal is to simplify the process of preparing frequently needed legal and routine documents, breaking the repetitive copy-paste cycles. By leveraging technology, we allow you to create your standard document needs with your own information flawlessly in seconds.
aboutUs.paragraph2: The templates on our site are prepared with general needs in mind. By filling out the smart form fields we designed for you, you can personalize these templates according to your situation and instantly download them in PDF format or save them to your workspace.
aboutUs.importantNoteContent: is not a law firm, and the services we provide do not substitute for legal advice. We strongly recommend always consulting a legal professional to ensure the exact suitability and legal validity of the documents you create for your specific situation.

contactUs.metaDescription: Contact Belge Hızlı. You can reach out to us for questions, suggestions, or collaboration requests.
contactUs.title: Contact Information
contactUs.paragraph1: You can use the information below for your questions, suggestions, or technical support requests.
contactUs.paragraph2: For customer support requests, we kindly ask you to primarily use our <bold>email address</bold>.

legal.preInfoDesc: Review the pre-information form regarding our services.
legal.privacyDesc: Learn about how we process and protect your personal data.

legal.termsDesc: Read the terms of use and contract details of our platform.
